apps.scanningHint: This may take a few seconds

disk.title: Disk Analysis
disk.selectDrive: Select a drive above to scan and visualize disk usage.

delete.title: Delete {type}
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{name}"?

uninstall.title: Uninstall
uninstall.confirm: Are you sure you want to uninstall "{name}"? This will run the application's uninstaller and may take a moment.
uninstall.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove the registry entry for "{name}"? This only removes the entry from Windows — it does not delete any files.
uninstall.pendingMessage: Uninstaller finished — click Recheck to verify removal
uninstall.stillInRegistry: Still in registry — try again or remove the entry manually

bulkRemove.title: Remove All Leftover Entries
bulkRemove.confirm: This will remove {count} leftover registry entries. These are entries for apps whose install folder no longer exists. This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.about: A modern Windows app manager and disk analyzer. Clean up installed apps, remove orphan registry entries, and visualize disk usage.

errors.accessDenied: Access denied — this file is protected or in use by another program. Close any programs using it and try again.
errors.notAffected: Purgr encountered an unexpected error. Your system was not affected.
